title: Unauthorized File Download
description: Sensitive documents were accessed from a shared workstation. Analyse browsing history and download artefacts to determine the sequence of events.

events.description: Bing search: "meridian corp intranet document library"
events.explanation: The session started with a targeted search for the internal document repository.

events.description: Visited https://intranet.meridiancorp.local/ (title: Meridian Corp Intranet Home)
events.explanation: The browser accessed the corporate intranet landing page from the search result.

events.description: Cookie set: SSO_SESSION on intranet.meridiancorp.local (HttpOnly, expires 2024-10-22T20:33:42Z)
events.explanation: Single sign-on authentication established a session cookie, confirming the user was logged into the intranet.
An internal search for confidential financial material indicates deliberate targeting of sensitive files.
The search returned the restricted finance report page in the browser history.

events.description: Downloaded Q3_2024_Financial_Report_CONFIDENTIAL.pdf to C:\Users\SharedWS\Downloads\ (1.8 MB, Chrome)
events.explanation: The confidential PDF was saved locally, creating a key exfiltration artefact on the shared workstation.
Shortly after the download, the user opened a cloud storage service, suggesting intent to upload or transfer the file.
An active Google session cookie confirms the cloud storage account was already authenticated during the transfer window.
